AgentDependency-Input.description:
Represents a dependency for an agent.

Scope Precedence:
    When resolving dependencies, the scope is determined by the following precedence
    (highest to lowest):
    1. org_level - If True, dependency is shared across all guilds in the organization.
       The resolver receives org_id only (guild_id=ORG_GLOBAL, agent_id=ORG_GLOBAL).
    2. guild_level - If True, dependency is shared across all agents in the guild.
       The resolver receives org_id and guild_id (agent_id=GUILD_GLOBAL).
    3. agent_level - Default. Dependency is scoped to the specific agent.
       The resolver receives org_id, guild_id, and agent_id.

    Note: If both org_level and guild_level are True, org_level takes precedence
    and guild_level is ignored.
AgentDependency-Input.title: AgentDependency

AgentDependency-Output.description:
Represents a dependency for an agent.

Scope Precedence:
    When resolving dependencies, the scope is determined by the following precedence
    (highest to lowest):
    1. org_level - If True, dependency is shared across all guilds in the organization.
       The resolver receives org_id only (guild_id=ORG_GLOBAL, agent_id=ORG_GLOBAL).
    2. guild_level - If True, dependency is shared across all agents in the guild.
       The resolver receives org_id and guild_id (agent_id=GUILD_GLOBAL).
    3. agent_level - Default. Dependency is scoped to the specific agent.
       The resolver receives org_id, guild_id, and agent_id.

    Note: If both org_level and guild_level are True, org_level takes precedence
    and guild_level is ignored.

agent_level.description: Whether the dependency is at the agent level.
agent_level.title: Agent Level

AgentDependency-Output.title: AgentDependency

AgentSpec-Input.description:
A specification for an agent that describes its name, description, and properties.

Attributes:
    name (str): The name of the agent.
    description (str): A description of the agent.
    class_name (str): The name of the class of the agent.
    additional_topics (List[str]): A list of additional topics to which the agent should subscribe.
    properties (APT): The properties of the agent.
    listen_to_default_topic (bool): Whether the agent should listen to the default topic.

predicates.description: A mapping of functions to their runtime predicates.
predicates.title: Predicates

AgentSpec-Input.title: AgentSpec

AgentSpec-Output.description:
A specification for an agent that describes its name, description, and properties.

Attributes:
    name (str): The name of the agent.
    description (str): A description of the agent.
    class_name (str): The name of the class of the agent.
    additional_topics (List[str]): A list of additional topics to which the agent should subscribe.
    properties (APT): The properties of the agent.
    listen_to_default_topic (bool): Whether the agent should listen to the default topic.

predicates.description: A mapping of functions to their runtime predicates.
predicates.title: Predicates

AgentSpec-Output.title: AgentSpec

AgentTag.description:
Represents a tag that can be assigned to an agent.

Attributes:
    name (str): The name of the agent.
    id (str): The id of the agent.
AgentTag.title: AgentTag

ForwardHeader.description:
Represents the header for a forwarded message.

Attributes:
    origin_message_id (int): ID of the original message.
    on_behalf_of (AgentTag): The agent on whose behalf the message is forwarded.
ForwardHeader.title: ForwardHeader

GuildSpec.description:
A specification for a guild that describes its name, description, and agents.

Attributes:
    name (str): The name of the guild.
    description (str): A description of the guild.
    properties (Dict[str, Any]): The properties of the guild.
    agents (list[AgentSpec]): A list of agents in the guild.
    dependency_map (Dict[str, DependencySpec]): A mapping for guild's dependency to resolver class.
    routes (RoutingSlip): The routes to be attached to every message coming in the guild.
    gateway (Optional[GatewayConfig]): Configuration for the automatic GatewayAgent.
GuildSpec.title: GuildSpec

GuildSpecResponse.description: Response for a guild specification that describes its name, description, agents, routes, and status.
GuildSpecResponse.title: GuildSpecResponse

GuildStackEntry.description:
Represents an entry in the origin_guild_stack for cross-guild routing.

When a message crosses guild boundaries, each guild in the chain pushes an entry
onto the stack. The entry contains the guild ID and optionally a saga_id that
references preserved session state in the guild's state store.

Attributes:
    guild_id (str): The ID of the guild that forwarded the message.
    saga_id (Optional[str]): Reference to preserved session state in guild_state.
        When set, the gateway will restore the session state from
        guild_state["g2g:saga:{saga_id}"] when the response returns.
GuildStackEntry.title: GuildStackEntry

message_format_schema.description: The schema for the message format.
message_format_schema.title: Message Format Schema

send_message_calls.description: The calls to send messages from this agent.
send_message_calls.title: Send Message Calls

LaunchGuildFromBlueprintRequest.description: Request to launch a guild from a blueprint.
LaunchGuildFromBlueprintRequest.title: LaunchGuildFromBlueprintRequest

Message.description:
Represents a message to be published on the message bus.

Attributes:
    sender (AgentTag): The sender of the message.
    topics (str): The topics to which the message belongs.
    recipient_list (List[AgentTag]): List of agents tagged in the message.
    payload (JsonDict): The actual content or payload of the message.
    format (str): The type of the message.
    in_response_to (Optional[int]): ID of the message to which this is a reply, if any.
    thread (List[int]): The list of threads to which the message belongs.
    conversation_id (Optional[int]): ID of the conversation to which the message belongs.
    forwarding_header (Optional[ForwardingHeader]): The header for a forwarded message.
    routing_slip (Optional[RoutingSlip]): The routing slip for the message.
    message_history (List[ProcessEntry]): The history of the message.
    ttl (Optional[int]): The time to live for the message.
    topic_published_to (Optional[str]): The topic to which the message was published.
    enrich_with_history (Optional[int]): The number of previous messages to include in the context.
    process_status (Optional[str]): The status of message processing.

Raises:
    ValueError: If the provided payload is not JSON-serializable or if any of the attributes are not valid.

current_thread_id.description:
Read-only property to get the current thread ID of the message.

Returns:
    int: The current thread ID of the message.
current_thread_id.title: Current Thread Id

id.description:
Read-only property to get the ID of the message.

Returns:
    int: The ID of the message.
id.title: Id

priority.description:
Read-only property to get the priority of the message.

Returns:
    Priority: The priority of the message.

root_thread_id.description:
Read-only property to get the root thread ID of the message.

Returns:
    int: The root thread ID of the message.
root_thread_id.title: Root Thread Id

timestamp.description:
Read-only property to get the timestamp of the message.

Returns:
    float: The timestamp of the message.
timestamp.title: Timestamp

Message.title: Message

ProcessEntry.description:
Represents an entry for agent and previous message in the message history.

Attributes:
    agent (AgentTag): Identifier or name of the agent.
    origin (int): ID of the previous message.
    result (int): ID of the current message.
    processor (str): The processor that handled the message.
ProcessEntry.title: ProcessEntry

QOSSpec.description:
A specification for the Quality of Service (QoS) settings for an agent.

Attributes:
    timeout (Optional[int]): The timeout for the agent's operations in seconds.
    retry_count (Optional[int]): The number of retries for the agent's operations.
    latency (Optional[int]): The maximum acceptable latency for the agent's operations in milliseconds.
QOSSpec.title: QOSSpec

ResourceSpec.description:
A specification for the resources required by an agent.

Attributes:
    num_cpus (Optional[int | float]): The number of CPUs required by the agent.
    num_gpus (Optional[int | float]): The number of GPUs required by the agent.
    custom_resources (Optional[Dict[str, int | float]]): A dictionary of custom resources required by the agent.
ResourceSpec.title: ResourceSpec

RoutingDestination.description:
Represents a destination for a message in a routing slip.

Attributes:
    topics (Optional[Union[str, List[str]]]): The topic to send the message to be processed, if not specified, it will be same as the
        incoming message with a fallback to default_topic.
    recipient_list (List[AgentTag]): List of agents to tag for this step, be default it will not tag any agents.
    priority (Optional[Priority]): The priority of the message produced .
RoutingDestination.title: RoutingDestination

RoutingOrigin.description:
Represents a filter for a message that triggered the current step in a routing slip.

Attributes:
    origin_sender (Optional[AgentTag]): The agent that sent the message that triggered the current step.
    origin_topic (Optional[str]): The topic where the original message was sent.
    origin_message_format (Optional[str]): The format of the original message.
RoutingOrigin.title: RoutingOrigin

RoutingRule-Input.description:
Represents an entry in a routing slip.

Attributes:
    agent (Optional[AgentTag]): The agent which is sending this message. Either this or agent_type must be provided.
    agent_type (Optional[str]): The type of the agent sending the message. Either this or agent must be provided.
    method_name (Optional[str]): The method in the agent from which the message is sent.
    origin_filter (Optional[RoutingOrigin]): Apply the step if the origin message that triggered the process matches the filter.
    message_format (Optional[str]): The format of the message being sent that this step will act on.
    destination (Optional[RoutingDestination]): The destination for the message.
    mark_forwarded (Optional[bool]): Mark the message as forwarded.
    route_times (Optional[int]): The number of times to route the message. If -1, it will route everytime the rule is satified. Default is 1.
    transformer (Optional[Transformation]): The transformer to be applied to the message.
    agent_state_update (Optional[StateTransformer]): The state update request to be applied to the agent.
    guild_state_update (Optional[StateTransformer]): The state update request to be applied to the guild.
    process_status (Optional[ProcessStatus]): The status of message processing.
RoutingRule-Input.title: RoutingRule

RoutingRule-Output.description:
Represents an entry in a routing slip.

Attributes:
    agent (Optional[AgentTag]): The agent which is sending this message. Either this or agent_type must be provided.
    agent_type (Optional[str]): The type of the agent sending the message. Either this or agent must be provided.
    method_name (Optional[str]): The method in the agent from which the message is sent.
    origin_filter (Optional[RoutingOrigin]): Apply the step if the origin message that triggered the process matches the filter.
    message_format (Optional[str]): The format of the message being sent that this step will act on.
    destination (Optional[RoutingDestination]): The destination for the message.
    mark_forwarded (Optional[bool]): Mark the message as forwarded.
    route_times (Optional[int]): The number of times to route the message. If -1, it will route everytime the rule is satified. Default is 1.
    transformer (Optional[Transformation]): The transformer to be applied to the message.
    agent_state_update (Optional[StateTransformer]): The state update request to be applied to the agent.
    guild_state_update (Optional[StateTransformer]): The state update request to be applied to the guild.
    process_status (Optional[ProcessStatus]): The status of message processing.
RoutingRule-Output.title: RoutingRule

RoutingSlip-Input.description:
Represents a routing slip for a message.

Attributes:
    steps (List[RoutingEntry]): List of routing steps for the message. Each step is an edge in the routing slip.
RoutingSlip-Input.title: RoutingSlip

RoutingSlip-Output.description:
Represents a routing slip for a message.

Attributes:
    steps (List[RoutingEntry]): List of routing steps for the message. Each step is an edge in the routing slip.
RoutingSlip-Output.title: RoutingSlip

calling_class.description: The class containing the calling function
calling_class.title: Calling Class

message_type.description: The type of the message being sent
message_type.title: Message Type

StateTransformer.description:
Represents a transformer to be applied to the state of an agent or guild.

Attributes:
    expression (str): The transformer to be applied to the state. This is a JSONata expression.
    output_format (str): The format of the transformed state.
StateTransformer.title: StateTransformer

StateUpdateFormat.description:
An enumeration of the formats that state updates can be sent in.
Currently we support JSON Patch (https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc6902) and
JSON Merge Patch (https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc7386) is supported.
In future we will support crdt and other formats based on requirements.
Important Note:
JSON Merge Patch (RFC 7386) is a more flexible format that allows for the creation of intermediate structures.
JSON Patch (RFC 6902) is a more strict format that requires the target structure to already exist.
If using JSON Patch, ensure that the paths provided in operations you are updating already exist in the state.
If you are not sure whether a path exists, provide the patch to the State Update Request instead of in the operations.
StateUpdateFormat.title: StateUpdateFormat

get.description:
Retrieves all boards for a guild.

Args:
    guild_id (str): The ID of the guild to get boards for.

Returns:
    BoardsResponse: The boards for the guild.

post.description:
Creates a new board for a guild.

Args:
    guild_id (str): The ID of the guild to create the board for.
    board (CreateBoardRequest): The board creation request.

Returns:
    IdInfo: The id of the newly created board.

get.description:
Retrieves all message IDs for a board.

Args:
    board_id (str): The ID of the board to get messages for.

Returns:
    BoardMessagesResponse: The message IDs in the board.

post.description:
Adds a message to a board.

Args:
    board_id (str): The ID of the board to add the message to.
    request (AddMessageToBoardRequest): The request containing the message_id.

Returns:
    dict: Success message.

delete.description:
Removes a message from a board.

Args:
    board_id (str): The ID of the board to remove the message from.
    message_id (str): The ID of the message to remove.

Returns:
    dict: Success message.

post.description:
Creates a new guild and adds it to the database.

Args:
    launch_req (LaunchGuildReq):  object with spec for the new guild and the org id

Returns:
    IdInfo: The id of the newly created guild

get.description:
Retrieves details for a guild based on the provided guild_id.

Args:
    guild_id (str): The ID of the guild to retrieve details for.

Returns:
    GuildSpecResponse: The retrieved guild details, or None if the guild was not found.

Raises:
    HTTPException: If the guild is not found, raises an HTTPException with a status code of 404.

post.description: Relaunches a guild if it is not already running.

get.summary: Get Bp Agent Icons By Name

post.summary: Add Bp Agent Icon By Name

get.description: Get the list of users added to a guild. This includes both active and inactive users.
